'''ngawaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaddar|chaddar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaddar|chaddar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngawaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwæjæth|ngæwæjæth]] || [[word:ngæwæjæj|ngæwæjæj]] || [[word:ngæwæjæsh|ngæwæjæsh]] || [[word:ngæwæjæ|ngæwæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawawajath|ngawawajath]] || [[word:ngawawajaj|ngawawajaj]] || [[word:ngawawajash|ngawawajash]] || [[word:ngawawaja|ngawawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawajath|ngawajath]] || [[word:ngawajaj|ngawajaj]] || [[word:ngawajash|ngawajash]] || [[word:ngawaja|ngawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawafjath|ngawafjath]] || [[word:ngawafjaj|ngawafjaj]] || [[word:ngawafjash|ngawafjash]] || [[word:ngawafjaf|ngawafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawajatha|ngawajatha]] || [[word:ngawajaja|ngawajaja]] || [[word:ngawajasha|ngawajasha]] || [[word:ngawajaka|ngawajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawajath|ngawajath]] || [[word:ngawajaj|ngawajaj]] || [[word:ngawajash|ngawajash]] || [[word:ngawaja|ngawaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawajathal|ngawajathal]] || [[word:ngawajajal|ngawajajal]] || [[word:ngawajashal|ngawajashal]] || [[word:ngawajakal|ngawajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawajathatha|ngawajathatha]] || [[word:ngawajajaja|ngawajajaja]] || [[word:ngawajashasha|ngawajashasha]] || [[word:ngawajaka|ngawajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawajathan|ngawajathan]] || [[word:ngawajajan|ngawajajan]] || [[word:ngawajashan|ngawajashan]] || [[word:ngawajakan|ngawajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawajathaoro|ngawajathaoro]] || [[word:ngawajajaoro|ngawajajaoro]] || [[word:ngawajashaoro|ngawajashaoro]] || [[word:ngawajakaoro|ngawajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
